title: A crash occurs when preparing an INSERT on joined tables during the query semantic phase
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test201 (id Int32, name String, value Decimal(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test201 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.50);
INSERT INTO test201 (id, name, value) SELECT temp.id, temp.name, parent.value FROM (SELECT 2 AS id, 'Sample' AS name) AS temp JOIN test201 AS parent ON (parent.id = temp.id);
INSERT INTO test201 (id, name, value) SELECT temp.id, temp.name, NULL FROM (SELECT 3 AS id, 'Example' AS name) AS temp LEFT JOIN test201 AS parent ON (parent.id = temp.id);
key_bug_features: INSERT on joined tables during query semantic phase
